response: {"action":"sql","sql":"SELECT d.dept_nm, s.cntry_cd, SUM(ol.line_amt) AS tot_revenue FROM ord_ln ol JOIN ord_hdr oh ON ol.ord_id = oh.ord_id JOIN prod_ref p ON ol.prod_id = p.prod_id JOIN dept_dim d ON p.dept_cd = d.dept_cd JOIN store_dim s ON oh.store_id = s.store_id GROUP BY d.dept_nm, s.cntry_cd ORDER BY d.dept_nm, s.cntry_cd;","reason":null}
